title: Opportunity
content:
Send forth your heart's desire, and work and wait;
    The opportunities of life are brought
    To our own doors, not by capricious fate,
    But by the strong compelling force of thought.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ella Wheeler Wilcox, titled "Opportunity", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
